source.name: Immigration Portal CZ — Long-term visa for the purpose of studies

extraSources.name: Study in Czechia — Entry formalities & visa

requirements.label: Confirmation of study
requirements.detail: A confirmation of admission/enrolment from a Czech higher-education institution.

requirements.label: Funds requirement
requirements.detail: Show funds for the stay — commonly around CZK 110,000–130,000 for a year (the formula adds a base amount plus a monthly figure).

requirements.label: Health insurance
requirements.detail: Comprehensive travel/health insurance valid in Czechia for the visa period.

requirements.label: English/Czech language proof
requirements.detail: IELTS/TOEFL for English-taught, or a Czech certificate for Czech-taught.

requirements.label: Valid passport
requirements.detail: A passport valid for the long-term visa period.

requirements.label: Proof of accommodation
requirements.detail: Proof of accommodation in Czechia is required.

requirements.label: Criminal record extract
requirements.detail: An extract from your criminal record is usually required.

requirements.label: Tuition / funds transfer
requirements.detail: Transfer fees or living funds with a low-FX provider.

requirements.label: Connectivity on arrival
requirements.detail: An eSIM gives you a Czech number and data on landing.
